name: jBOM Fabrication
description: BOM, pick-and-place, and Gerber fabrication package for KiCad PCB projects
description_full: jBOM Fabrication provides one-click BOM, pick-and-place (CPL), and Gerber generation directly from the KiCad PCB editor toolbar. Supports multiple fabricators: JLC PCBA, PCBWay, Seeed Studio, and a generic profile. Per-project fabricator selection and inventory file path are persisted in .jbom/jbom-options.json. Requires KiCad 9.0 or later on macOS, Linux, or Windows. All runtime dependencies (pydantic, pyyaml, etc.) are vendored — no pip install required. The jBOM CLI and Python library are available separately via pip install jbom.
